improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access with membership."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business decisions. Start with three free searches.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the product value proposition. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical channels for reaching business professionals. The copy highlights key differentiators (Claude-powered, voice chat, free trial) without making unverified claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Get instant answers, voice chat support, and professional guidance for your business operations. Try three free searches now — no credit card required.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately establishes what Gideon is (AI assistant for trade/business), while the subheading communicates three key value props and removes friction by highlighting the free trial with no payment barrier. The direct address ('Your') creates personal relevance, and 'Meet Gideon' humanizes the AI brand.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan to continue. Plans start from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual billing saving you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business assistance, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the user journey—the transition from free trial to paid membership. By clearly explaining what happens at the paywall and immediately reinforcing the low entry price and value received, it reduces uncertainty and supports conversion at the critical decision moment.
